{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Twin Star Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Twin Star Sage]] is a legendary figure.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Twin Star Sage]] is also known as the [[Sage of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
